column1: # Canonical tier-1 prebuilt target table for twig-sys payload crates.
# Consumed by scripts/gen-payloads.sh, scripts/build-payload-lib.sh, and mirrored
# (by hand) into twig-sys/Cargo.toml cfg deps + twig-sys/build.rs payload_env_key.
# Adding a target = one row here + rerun gen-payloads.sh + add the cfg dep and
# build.rs arm. Targets NOT listed here fall back to the vendored zig source build.
